tasks.subject: Task 1: Write failing tests for staging subdirectory behavior
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add unit tests that assert the staging-dir contract before the implementation changes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] New `TestCreateArchiveStaging` class with 3 tests
- [ ] 2 structural tests (source inspection) fail before Task 2
- [ ] 1 behavior test (end-to-end simulation) passes immediately, documents the contract

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestCreateArchiveStaging -v` → 2 FAIL + 1 PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestCreateArchiveStaging -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TestCreateArchiveStaging class added", "2 structural tests fail initially", "1 behavior simulation test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Replace _create_archive with staging subdirectory implementation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the structural tests from Task 1 pass by implementing the new staging behavior in `archive_crawl`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py` (replace `_create_archive` inner function, currently lines 1468-1494)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `_create_archive` writes to `{archives_dir}/.staging/{crawl_id}.tar.gz` first
- [ ] After size + integrity checks pass, `os.rename` moves to `{archives_dir}/{crawl_id}.tar.gz`
- [ ] A `finally` block removes staging file on any failure (gated by `if staging_path`)
- [ ] All 3 tests from Task 1 pass
- [ ] No regression in pre-existing tests

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v` → all tests PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["archives written to .staging/ subdir", "atomic rename to final path", "finally block cleans up partial files", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Document the .staging convention in CLAUDE.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the `.staging/` convention so future changes to the upload daemon or archiving path don't break the fix.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Archiving section mentions the `.staging/` subdirectory
- [ ] Explicit warning against making the upload daemon scan subdirectories

**Verify:** visual inspection of `CLAUDE.md` → archiving section references `.staging/`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q '.staging' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": [".staging mentioned in archiving section", "warning about daemon subdir scanning"]}
```
